metadata.notes: Automatic cancellation based on a temporal pattern (24 hours prior)

inputs.vague: The Spirit Director cancels an appearance request, provides a reason, and the system processes the cancellation, including any refunds and notifying relevant parties.
inputs.detailed:
Primary Actor:
Spirit Director
Secondary Actors:
Customer, Payment System, SuperFrog Student
Trigger:
The Spirit Director indicates to cancel an “Approved” or “Assigned” SuperFrog appearance request.
Or
Payment of an “Approved” or “Assigned” request is not received 24 hours prior to the event date and time.
Description:
The Spirit Director wants to cancel an “Approved” or “Assigned” request, so that she can accommodate a TCU Athletic Department function, weather, or an emergency situation. (See BR-9)

In another scenario, an “Approved” or “Assigned” request shall be canceled automatically if payment is not received 24 hours prior to the event date and time. (See BR-7)
Preconditions:
PRE-1. There exists at least one “Approved” or “Assigned” request in the System.
PRE-2. The Spirit Director is logged into the System.
PRE-3. The User has the “admin” privilege.
Postconditions:
POST-1. The request is updated in the System with a status of “Canceled by the Spirit Director” or “Canceled due to no payment”.
Main Success Scenario:
The Spirit Director indicates to cancel an “Approved” or “Assigned” SuperFrog appearance request.
The Spirit Director views the details of this “Approved” or “Assigned” appearance request through UC-7: View an appearance request and chooses to cancel the request.
The System asks the Spirit Director to enter a reason and then confirm.
The Spirit Director enters the reason and confirms the cancellation.
The System marks the request as “Canceled by the Spirit Director”.
The System has the Payment System process refund.
The System cancels the SuperFrog Student sign-up related to this request if it has been signed up already.
The System notifies relevant actors about the cancellation according to the “Notification” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
Use case ends.
Extensions:
1a. Payment is not received 24 hours prior to the event date and time:
1a1. The System automatically updates the request’s status to “Canceled due to no payment”. The cancellation reason is “Canceled due to no payment”.
1a2. Returns to step 7 of the normal flow.
6a. Customer has not made a payment yet:
6a1. Returns to step 7 of the normal flow.

groundTruth.name: Cancel SuperFrog Appearance Request
groundTruth.summary: This use case describes how the Spirit Director cancels an 'Approved' or 'Assigned' SuperFrog appearance request, or how the System automatically cancels it if payment is not received on time.
preconditions: There exists at least one “Approved” or “Assigned” request in the System.
The Spirit Director is logged into the System.

steps.description: Indicates to cancel an 'Approved' or 'Assigned' SuperFrog appearance request.
Views the details of the request (through Use Case 'View an appearance request').
Asks the Spirit Director to enter a reason and confirm.
Enters the reason and confirms the cancellation.
Marks the request as 'Canceled by the Spirit Director'.
Has the Payment System process refund.
Cancels the SuperFrog Student sign-up related to this request if it has been signed up already.
Notifies relevant actors about the cancellation.
Automatically updates the request’s status to “Canceled due to no payment”.
Sets the cancellation reason to “Canceled due to no payment”.
